'''Cecil''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] mechanic aboard the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] that he, [[Rosen]], [[Benchar]], and [[Carewa]] served on. He was also an excellent [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] player.<ref name="FC" />
